## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14

-->
Rehash of #153, now that the interface has slightly changed after #152.

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
- Cleaner/more comprehensive plots
- Verification that `Unconstrained` and `SSPConstrained` algorithms are identical without limiters.

title: Update plotting analysis
